     The Numbers Business Report

Ambulance (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $22,781,115Details
International Box Office $29,399,980
Worldwide Box Office $52,181,095
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $888,895
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,308,512
Total $2,197,407
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Over one day across the streets of L.A., three lives will change forever. Decorated veteran Will Sharp, desperate for money to cover his wife’s medical bills, asks for help from the one person he knows he shouldn’t—his adoptive brother Danny. A charismatic career criminal, Danny instead offers him a score: the biggest bank heist in Los Angeles history: $32 million. With his wife’s survival on the line, Will can’t say no. But when their getaway goes spectacularly wrong, the desperate brothers hijack an ambulance with a wounded cop clinging to life and ace EMT Cam Thompson onboard. In a high-speed pursuit that never stops, Will and Danny must evade a massive, city-wide law enforcement response, keep their hostages alive, and somehow try not to kill each other, all while executing the most insane escape L.A. has ever seen.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,699,630 (38.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.62 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:43.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,412 opening theaters/3,412 max. theaters, 3.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $25,874,850

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 8th, 2022 (Wide) by Universal
April 8th, 2022 (IMAX) by Universal
International Releases: March 16th, 2022 (Wide) (Philippines)
March 16th, 2022 (Wide) (Indonesia)
March 17th, 2022 (Wide), released as Sanitka (Slovakia)
March 17th, 2022 (Wide) (Venezuela)
March 17th, 2022 (Wide) (Trinidad)
Video Release: May 3rd, 2022 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for intense violence, bloody images and language throughout.
(Rating bulletin 2706 (cert #53492), 11/10/2021)
Running Time: 136 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Foreign-Language Remake, Remake
Filming location (city or town): Los Angeles, CA
Filming location (country): United States
Plot point: Fugitive / On the Run, Heist, Hostage, Money Troubles
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Endeavor Content, Bay Films, New Republic Pictures, Project X Entertainment, Universal Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Over one day across the streets of L.A., three lives will change forever. Decorated veteran Will Sharp, desperate for money to cover his wife’s medical bills, asks for help from the one person he knows he shouldn’t—his adoptive brother Danny. A charismatic career criminal, Danny instead offers him a score: the biggest bank heist in Los Angeles history: $32 million. With his wife’s survival on the line, Will can’t say no. But when their getaway goes spectacularly wrong, the desperate brothers hijack an ambulance with a wounded cop clinging to life and ace EMT Cam Thompson onboard. In a high-speed pursuit that never stops, Will and Danny must evade a massive, city-wide law enforcement response, keep their hostages alive, and somehow try not to kill each other, all while executing the most insane escape L.A. has ever seen.
